member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.F22
member.summary: F22 key, (PPC only) Key used to lock device.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.BROWSER_HOME
member.summary: Windows 2000/XP: Browser Start and Home key

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_1
member.summary: Used for miscellaneous characters; it can vary by keyboard.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_PLUS
member.summary: Windows 2000/XP: For any country/region, the '+' key

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_COMMA
member.summary: Windows 2000/XP: For any country/region, the ',' key

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_MINUS
member.summary: Windows 2000/XP: For any country/region, the '-' key

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_PERIOD
member.summary: Windows 2000/XP: For any country/region, the '.' key

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_2
member.summary: Used for miscellaneous characters; it can vary by keyboard.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_3
member.summary: Used for miscellaneous characters; it can vary by keyboard.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_4
member.summary: Used for miscellaneous characters; it can vary by keyboard.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_5
member.summary: Used for miscellaneous characters; it can vary by keyboard.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_6
member.summary: Used for miscellaneous characters; it can vary by keyboard.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_7
member.summary: Used for miscellaneous characters; it can vary by keyboard.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_8
member.summary: Used for miscellaneous characters; it can vary by keyboard.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.OEM_102
member.summary: Windows 2000/XP: Either the angle bracket key or the backslash key on the RT 102-key keyboard

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.PROCESSKEY
member.summary: Windows 95/98/Me, Windows NT 4.0, Windows 2000/XP: IME PROCESS key

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.VK.PACKET
member.summary: Windows 2000/XP: Used to pass Unicode characters as if they were keystrokes. The VK_PACKET key is the low word of a 32-bit Virtual Key value used for non-keyboard input methods. For more information, see Remark in KEYBDINPUT, SendInput, WM_KEYDOWN, and WM_KEYUP

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_ACCEPTFILES
member.summary: Specifies a window that accepts drag-drop files.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_APPWINDOW
member.summary: Forces a top-level window onto the taskbar when the window is visible.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_CLIENTEDGE
member.summary: Specifies a window that has a border with a sunken edge.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_COMPOSITED
member.summary: Specifies a window that paints all descendants in bottom-to-top painting order using double-buffering. This cannot be used if the window has a class style of either CS_OWNDC or CS_CLASSDC. This style is not supported in Windows 2000.
member.remarks: With WS_EX_COMPOSITED set, all descendants of a window get bottom-to-top painting order using double-buffering. Bottom-to-top painting order allows a descendent window to have translucency (alpha) and transparency (color-key) effects, but only if the descendent window also has the WS_EX_TRANSPARENT bit set. Double-buffering allows the window and its descendents to be painted without flicker.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_CONTEXTHELP
member.summary: Specifies a window that includes a question mark in the title bar. When the user clicks the question mark, the cursor changes to a question mark with a pointer. If the user then clicks a child window, the child receives a WM_HELP message. The child window should pass the message to the parent window procedure, which should call the WinHelp function using the HELP_WM_HELP command. The Help application displays a pop-up window that typically contains help for the child window. WS_EX_CONTEXTHELP cannot be used with the WS_MAXIMIZEBOX or WS_MINIMIZEBOX styles.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_CONTROLPARENT
member.summary: Specifies a window which contains child windows that should take part in dialog box navigation. If this style is specified, the dialog manager recurses into children of this window when performing navigation operations such as handling the TAB key, an arrow key, or a keyboard mnemonic.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_DLGMODALFRAME
member.summary: Specifies a window that has a double border.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_LAYERED
member.summary: Specifies a window that is a layered window. This cannot be used for child windows or if the window has a class style of either CS_OWNDC or CS_CLASSDC.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_LAYOUTRTL
member.summary: Specifies a window with the horizontal origin on the right edge. Increasing horizontal values advance to the left. The shell language must support reading-order alignment for this to take effect.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_LEFT
member.summary: Specifies a window that has generic left-aligned properties. This is the default.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_LEFTSCROLLBAR
member.summary: Specifies a window with the vertical scroll bar (if present) to the left of the client area. The shell language must support reading-order alignment for this to take effect.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_LTRREADING
member.summary: Specifies a window that displays text using left-to-right reading-order properties. This is the default.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_MDICHILD
member.summary: Specifies a multiple-document interface (MDI) child window.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_NOACTIVATE
member.summary: Specifies a top-level window created with this style does not become the foreground window when the user clicks it. The system does not bring this window to the foreground when the user minimizes or closes the foreground window. The window does not appear on the taskbar by default. To force the window to appear on the taskbar, use the WS_EX_APPWINDOW style. To activate the window, use the SetActiveWindow or SetForegroundWindow function.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_NOINHERITLAYOUT
member.summary: Specifies a window which does not pass its window layout to its child windows.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_NOPARENTNOTIFY
member.summary: Specifies that a child window created with this style does not send the WM_PARENTNOTIFY message to its parent window when it is created or destroyed.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_NOREDIRECTIONBITMAP
member.summary: The window does not render to a redirection surface. This is for windows that do not have visible content or that use mechanisms other than surfaces to provide their visual.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_PALETTEWINDOW
member.summary: Specifies a palette window, which is a modeless dialog box that presents an array of commands.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_RIGHT
member.summary: Specifies a window that has generic "right-aligned" properties. This depends on the window class. The shell language must support reading-order alignment for this to take effect. Using the WS_EX_RIGHT style has the same effect as using the SS_RIGHT (static), ES_RIGHT (edit), and BS_RIGHT/BS_RIGHTBUTTON (button) control styles.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_RIGHTSCROLLBAR
member.summary: Specifies a window with the vertical scroll bar (if present) to the right of the client area. This is the default.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_RTLREADING
member.summary: Specifies a window that displays text using right-to-left reading-order properties. The shell language must support reading-order alignment for this to take effect.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_STATICEDGE
member.summary: Specifies a window with a three-dimensional border style intended to be used for items that do not accept user input.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_TOOLWINDOW
member.summary: Specifies a window that is intended to be used as a floating toolbar. A tool window has a title bar that is shorter than a normal title bar, and the window title is drawn using a smaller font. A tool window does not appear in the taskbar or in the dialog that appears when the user presses ALT+TAB. If a tool window has a system menu, its icon is not displayed on the title bar. However, you can display the system menu by right-clicking or by typing ALT+SPACE.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_TOPMOST
member.summary: Specifies a window that should be placed above all non-topmost windows and should stay above them, even when the window is deactivated. To add or remove this style, use the SetWindowPos function.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_TRANSPARENT
member.summary: Specifies a window that should not be painted until siblings beneath the window (that were created by the same thread) have been painted. The window appears transparent because the bits of underlying sibling windows have already been painted. To achieve transparency without these restrictions, use the SetWindowRgn function.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.WindowStylesEx.WS_EX_WINDOWEDGE
member.summary: Specifies a window that has a border with a raised edge.

member.name: T:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags
member.summary: Options for functions related to popup menus and windows.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_LEFTBUTTON
member.summary: The user can select menu items with only the left mouse button.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_RIGHTBUTTON
member.summary: The user can select menu items with both the left and right mouse buttons.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_LEFTALIGN
member.summary: Positions the pop-up window so that its left edge is aligned with the coordinate specified by the anchorPoint->x parameter.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_CENTERALIGN
member.summary: Centers pop-up window horizontally relative to the coordinate specified by the anchorPoint->x parameter.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_RIGHTALIGN
member.summary: Positions the pop-up window so that its right edge is aligned with the coordinate specified by the anchorPoint->x parameter.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_TOPALIGN
member.summary: Positions the shortcut menu so that its top side is aligned with the coordinate specified by the y parameter.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_VCENTERALIGN
member.summary: Centers the shortcut menu vertically relative to the coordinate specified by the y parameter.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_BOTTOMALIGN
member.summary: Positions the shortcut menu so that its bottom side is aligned with the coordinate specified by the y parameter.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_HORIZONTAL
member.summary: If the menu cannot be shown at the specified location without overlapping the excluded rectangle, the system tries to accommodate the requested horizontal alignment before the requested vertical alignment.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_VERTICAL
member.summary: If the menu cannot be shown at the specified location without overlapping the excluded rectangle, the system tries to accommodate the requested vertical alignment before the requested horizontal alignment.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_NONOTIFY
member.summary: The function does not send notification messages when the user clicks a menu item.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_RETURNCMD
member.summary: The function returns the menu item identifier of the user's selection in the return value.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_RECURSE
member.summary: Displays a menu when another menu is already displayed. This is intended to support context menus within a menu.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_HORPOSANIMATION
member.summary: Animates the menu from left to right.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_HORNEGANIMATION
member.summary: Animates the menu from right to left.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_VERPOSANIMATION
member.summary: Animates the menu from top to bottom.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_VERNEGANIMATION
member.summary: Animates the menu from bottom to top.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeConstants.TrackPopupMenuFlags.TPM_WORKAREA
member.summary: Restricts the pop-up window to within the work area. If this flag is not set, the pop-up window is restricted to the work area only if the input point is within the work area. For more information, see the rcWork and rcMonitor members of the MONITORINFO structure.

member.name: T:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeMethods.WindowLongFlags
member.summary: Flags used for and methods to retrieve information about a window.

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeMethods.WindowLongFlags.GWL_WNDPROC
member.summary: The window procedure address or handle

member.name: F:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeMethods.WindowLongFlags.DWLP_DLGPROC
member.summary: The dialog procedure address or handle

member.name: T:PowerLib.NativeCodes.NativeStructures
member.summary: 封装本地代码使用的非托管结构

summary.para: The x- and y-coordinates of the cursor, in per-monitor-aware screen coordinates.

If the message is WM_MOUSEWHEEL, the high-order word of this member is the wheel delta. The low-order word is reserved. A positive value indicates that the wheel was rotated forward, away from the user; a negative value indicates that the wheel was rotated backward, toward the user. One wheel click is defined as WHEEL_DELTA, which is 120.

If the message is WM_XBUTTONDOWN, WM_XBUTTONUP, WM_XBUTTONDBLCLK, WM_NCXBUTTONDOWN, WM_NCXBUTTONUP, or WM_NCXBUTTONDBLCLK, the high-order word specifies which X button was pressed or released, and the low-order word is reserved. This value can be one or more of the following values. Otherwise, mouseData is not used.

item.term: The first X button was pressed or released.
The second X button was pressed or released.

summary.para: The event-injected flags. An application can use the following values to test the flags. Testing LLMHF_INJECTED (bit 0) will tell you whether the event was injected. If it was, then testing LLMHF_LOWER_IL_INJECTED (bit 1) will tell you whether or not the event was injected from a process running at lower integrity level.

item.term: Test the event-injected (from any process) flag.
Test the event-injected (from a process running at lower integrity level) flag.

summary.para: The time stamp for this message.
Additional information associated with the message.

member.name: T:PowerLib.Primitives.Color
member.summary: 表示一种 RGBA 颜色，包含 Alpha（透明度）、Red、Green 和 Blue 四个 8 位通道。 该结构体是平台无关的，可用于跨 UI 框架共享颜色数据。
member.remarks: 所有通道值范围为 0 到 255，其中 Alpha = 255 表示完全不透明，Alpha = 0 表示完全透明。

member.name: P:PowerLib.Primitives.Color.A
member.summary: 获取 Alpha 通道值（透明度）。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Color.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: 初始化 结构的新实例。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Color.FromArgb(System.Int32)
member.summary: 从 32 位 ARGB 值创建 。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Color.FromArgb(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: 从单独的 Alpha、Red、Green 和 Blue 通道值创建 。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Color.FromArgb(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 从单独的 Alpha、Red、Green 和 Blue 通道值创建 ，并确保通道值在有效范围内（0–255）。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Color.FromArgb(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: 从单独的 Red、Green 和 Blue 通道值创建不透明的 （Alpha = 255）。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Color.FromArgb(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: 从单独的 Red、Green 和 Blue 通道值创建不透明的 （Alpha = 255），并确保通道值在有效范围内（0–255）。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Color.ToArgb
member.summary: 获取该颜色的 32 位 ARGB 值（格式：0xAARRGGBB）。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Color.op_Equality(PowerLib.Primitives.Color,PowerLib.Primitives.Color)
member.summary: 确定两个 实例是否相等。
member.returns: 如果所有通道值相等，则为 ；否则为 。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Color.op_Inequality(PowerLib.Primitives.Color,PowerLib.Primitives.Color)
member.summary: 确定两个 实例是否不相等。
member.returns: 如果任意通道值不等，则为 ；否则为 。

member.name: T:PowerLib.Primitives.Point
member.summary: 表示二维坐标系中的一个点，由 X 和 Y 坐标定义。 该结构体是平台无关的，可用于跨 UI 框架共享位置数据。

member.name: P:PowerLib.Primitives.Point.X
member.summary: 获取或设置点的 X 坐标。

member.name: P:PowerLib.Primitives.Point.Y
member.summary: 获取或设置点的 Y 坐标。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Point.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: 初始化 结构的新实例。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Point.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: 确定指定的对象是否等于当前 。
member.returns: 如果对象是具有相同 X 和 Y 值的 ，则为 ；否则为 。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Point.GetHashCode
member.summary: 返回该 的哈希代码。
member.returns: 32 位有符号整数哈希代码。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Point.ToString
member.summary: 返回表示当前 的字符串。
member.returns: 格式为 "{X=[x], Y=[y]}" 的字符串。

member.name: T:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle
member.summary: 表示一个由位置（X, Y）和尺寸（Width, Height）定义的矩形区域。 该结构体是平台无关的，可用于跨 UI 框架（如 WinForms、WPF）共享几何数据。

member.name: P:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.X
member.summary: 获取或设置矩形左上角的 X 坐标。
member.value: 矩形左上角的 X 坐标，单位为与设备无关的逻辑单位。

member.name: P:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.Y
member.summary: 获取或设置矩形左上角的 Y 坐标。
member.value: 矩形左上角的 Y 坐标，单位为与设备无关的逻辑单位。

member.name: P:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.Width
member.summary: 获取或设置矩形的宽度。
member.value: 矩形的宽度，必须为非负数。
member.remarks: 虽然本结构体不强制验证宽度非负，但在 UI 渲染上下文中， 负宽度通常被视为无效或未定义行为。

member.name: P:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.Height
member.summary: 获取或设置矩形的高度。
member.value: 矩形的高度，必须为非负数。
member.remarks: 虽然本结构体不强制验证高度非负，但在 UI 渲染上下文中， 负高度通常被视为无效或未定义行为。

member.name: P:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.Right
member.summary: 获取矩形的右边界 X 坐标，即 X + Width。

member.name: P:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.Bottom
member.summary: 获取矩形的下边界 Y 坐标，即 Y + Height。

member.name: P:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.Location
member.summary: 获取矩形左上角的坐标点，等价于 new Point(X, Y)。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: 初始化 结构的新实例。
member.param: 矩形左上角的 X 坐标。
矩形左上角的 Y 坐标。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.#ctor(PowerLib.Primitives.Point,PowerLib.Primitives.Size)
member.summary: 初始化 结构的新实例，使用指定的位置和尺寸。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: 确定指定的对象是否等于当前 。
member.param: 要与当前矩形比较的对象。
member.returns: 如果 是 且其 X、Y、Width 和 Height 属性 与当前实例完全相等，则为 ；否则为 。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.GetHashCode
member.summary: 返回该 的哈希代码。
member.returns: 32 位有符号整数哈希代码。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle.ToString
member.summary: 返回表示当前 的字符串。
member.returns: 一个字符串，格式为 "{X=[x], Y=[y], Width=[w], Height=[h]}"， 其中数值使用当前文化格式化。

member.name: T:PowerLib.Primitives.Size
member.summary: 表示由宽度和高度定义的二维尺寸。 该结构体是平台无关的，适用于跨 UI 框架共享大小信息。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Size.#ctor(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: 初始化 结构的新实例。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Size.Equals(System.Object)
member.summary: 确定指定的对象是否等于当前 。
member.returns: 如果对象是具有相同 Width 和 Height 值的 ，则为 ；否则为 。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Size.GetHashCode
member.summary: 返回该 的哈希代码。
member.returns: 32 位有符号整数哈希代码。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Primitives.Size.ToString
member.summary: 返回表示当前 的字符串。
member.returns: 格式为 "{Width=[w], Height=[h]}" 的字符串。

member.name: M:PowerLib.Utilities.CommonUtility.GetSizeSuffix(System.Int64,System.Int32)
member.summary: 获取指定数据大小的后缀描述字符串

member.name: M:PowerLib.Utilities.GeometryUtility.GetDistance(PowerLib.Primitives.Point,PowerLib.Primitives.Point)
member.summary: 计算两点之间线段距离

member.name: M:PowerLib.Utilities.GeometryUtility.GetDistanceInMm(PowerLib.Primitives.Point,PowerLib.Primitives.Point,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: 计算两点之间线段距离，计算结果以毫米为单位

member.name: M:PowerLib.Utilities.GeometryUtility.GetAngleDiff(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: 获取指定角度的两条半径所组成的最小圆心角角度

member.name: M:PowerLib.Utilities.GeometryUtility.GetMidAngle(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: 获取指定角度的两条半径的中线角度

member.name: M:PowerLib.Utilities.GeometryUtility.GetOppositeAngle(System.Single)
member.summary: 获取指定角度的半径的相对半径的角度

member.name: M:PowerLib.Utilities.GeometryUtility.CreateRegularPolygon(PowerLib.Primitives.Point,System.Single,System.Int32,System.Double)
member.summary: 在指定位置创建正多边形

member.name: M:PowerLib.Utilities.GeometryUtility.RotateAt(PowerLib.Primitives.Point,PowerLib.Primitives.Point,System.Double)
member.summary: 计算一个点绕另一个点旋转后的坐标

member.name: M:PowerLib.Utilities.GeometryUtility.GetHexagonBySquare(PowerLib.Primitives.Rectangle,System.Single)
member.summary: 获取给定正方形内最大的六边形
member.param: 宽高比因子，值越大，六边形越宽

member.name: M:PowerLib.Utilities.GeometryUtility.GetLocationByAngle(PowerLib.Primitives.Point,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: 根据半径、角度求圆上坐标
